message:
fix: restrict useDashboardHealth polling to dashboard pages only (#3712)

DashboardProvider wraps the entire app, so useDashboardHealth() was
triggering cluster, alert, and pod-issue API calls on every page
(Settings, Missions, Alerts, etc.). Remove the unused health field
from the dashboard context since all consumers already call the hook
directly. Also gate CreateDashboardModal's inner content behind
isOpen so its health polling only runs while the modal is visible.

Closes #3670

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
